title: Communications between end of train devices and head of train devices on multiple trains
abstract: An electronic train device suitable of use on a railway vehicle includes a radio module configured, through operation of at least one processor, to support and monitor a plurality of communication channels for messages transmitted between multiple electronic train devices on multiple railway vehicles, and to repeat and/or route a transmitted message using a channel of the plurality of communication channels to provide reliable communication between the multiple electronic train devices.
claims: 1. An end of train device (EOT), comprising: a radio module configured, through operation of at least one processor, to support and monitor a plurality of communication channels for messages transmitted between multiple electronic train devices on multiple railway vehicles, and repeat a transmitted message using at least one channel of the plurality of communication channels to provide communication between the multiple electronic train devices on the multiple railway vehicles, wherein the multiple electronic train devices include end of train devices and head of train devices, and a tracking device providing location data of the railway vehicle, wherein the tracking device comprises a global positioning system (GPS) receiver or a global navigation satellite system (GNSS) receiver, wherein the EOT including the radio module is located on a first railway vehicle, wherein the radio module is configured to detect messages on a second railway vehicle, wherein the radio module is configured to route and repeat detected messages from an end of train device or a head of train device of the second railway vehicle via the EOT of the first railway vehicle.
